review: this app used to be great. i've reported close to 800 instances of graffiti in the last 7 months in my neighborhood. but over the last couple of months the app (and website) has become impossibly slow and an increasing number of problems makes it a frustrating experience to use. i'm better off calling 311 at this point. some current problems: it's slow, and frequently drops reports. i might have to submit and resubmit a report 3 or 4 times to get it through. it's the same when updating the location. super slow. i can stand there waiting an additional half minute waiting for a response from the server. oh and when i get to write in the report the app has a black background with black text. that's right. you can't even see what you're typing. every update introduces a new problem. when i log in to the website, it asks me to confirm if a report i made is mine or not. i made the report while signed in to my seeclickfix account on my phone. why do i need to confirm it? when i do i it takes the webpage a good 10-30 seconds to refresh. just additional frustration and more wasted time. i've called, emailed, and attempted to use their support forum (which also doesn't work) to no avail.
